=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = pipe(E)ffect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.gen(function*() { return yield* Effect.succeed(42) })

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = pipe(t)est1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 1: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = Effect.gen(function*() { return yield* test1 })

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R3] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = pipe(E)ffect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R3] Refactor 1: "Rewrite as pipe(X, Y, Z, ...)" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = pipe(Effect.succeed(42), Effect.map((n) => n + 1), Effect.map((n) => n - 1))

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R3] Refactor 2: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.gen(function*() { return yield* Effect.succeed(42) }).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R4] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = pipe(Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
))

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R4] Refactor 1: "Rewrite as pipe(X, Y, Z, ...)" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = pipe(Effect.succeed(42), Effect.map((n) => n + 1), Effect.map((n) => n - 1))

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R4] Refactor 2: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.gen(function*() { return yield* Effect.succeed(42) }).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R5] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(p)ipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R5] Refactor 1: "Rewrite as X.pipe(Y, Z, ...)" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1), Effect.map((n) => n - 1))


=== [R5] Refactor 2: "Rewrite to datafirst" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = Effect.map(Effect.map(Effect.succeed(42), n => n + 1), n => n - 1)


=== [R5] Refactor 3: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = Effect.gen(function*() { return yield* pipe(
  Effect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
) })


=== [R6] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(
  Efpipe(f)ect.succeed(42),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)


=== [R6] Refactor 1: "Rewrite as X.pipe(Y, Z, ...)" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1), Effect.map((n) => n - 1))


=== [R6] Refactor 2: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithEffectGen.ts ---
// refactor: 5:22-5:23, 7:22-7:23, 9:22-9:23, 9:22-12:1, 14:22-14:23, 15:5-15:6
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test1 = Effect.succeed(42)

export const test3 = test1

export const test2 = Effect.succeed(42).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)

export const test4 = pipe(
  Effect.gen(function*() { return yield* Effect.succeed(42) }),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n - 1)
)
